auth_context.notes: Platform API uses two auth pathways: Platform JWT (admin) and Service Token (internal). No ERP user JWT.

endpoints.description: Authenticate platform user with email/password + optional MFA

test_cases.name: Login - happy path with MFA code

db_verification.expected: lastLoginAt is updated to recent timestamp

test_cases.name: Login - PLATFORM_VIEWER without MFA (MFA optional for viewers)
Login - MFA required, no code provided → 202 challenge

endpoints.description: Verify TOTP code during MFA setup completion
Refresh access token using httpOnly refresh cookie

db_verification.expected: New refresh token created, old one revoked

endpoints.description: Logout - revoke refresh token and clear cookie
Create a new platform admin account

db_verification.query: SELECT id, email, role, "isActive" FROM "platform_users" WHERE email = 'newuser@nexa-platform.local'

endpoints.description: List platform admin accounts with pagination
Update platform admin account (role, active status, displayName, MFA reset)

test_cases.name: Update user - cannot deactivate own account → 400

endpoints.description: Create a new subscription plan

db_verification.query: SELECT id, code, "maxUsers", "enabledModules" FROM plans WHERE code = 'test-plan'
db_verification.expected: Record exists with maxUsers=25, enabledModules contains finance

endpoints.description: List all subscription plans with optional active filter
Update a subscription plan
Create a new tenant in PROVISIONING status

db_verification.query: SELECT t.id, t.status, tb."enforcementAction", taq."tokenAllowance" FROM tenants t LEFT JOIN tenant_billings tb ON tb."tenantId" = t.id LEFT JOIN tenant_ai_quotas taq ON taq."tenantId" = t.id WHERE t.code = 'test-tenant'
db_verification.expected: Tenant with PROVISIONING status, TenantBilling with NONE enforcement, TenantAiQuota record all exist

test_cases.name: Create tenant - code too short (< 3 chars)

endpoints.description: List tenants with filtering and pagination
Get full tenant detail including plan, modules, flags, billing, AI quota

test_cases.name: Get tenant detail - PLATFORM_VIEWER can view

endpoints.description: Update tenant settings (displayName, legalName, region, sandboxEnabled)
Transition tenant PROVISIONING → ACTIVE

db_verification.query: SELECT status FROM tenants WHERE id = '{provisioningTenantId}'

test_cases.name: Activate tenant - SUSPENDED → ACTIVE not via activate → 422

endpoints.description: Suspend tenant (ACTIVE/READ_ONLY → SUSPENDED). Reason mandatory (BR-PLT-001).

db_verification.query: SELECT t.status, pal.action FROM tenants t LEFT JOIN platform_audit_logs pal ON pal."targetId" = t.id::text AND pal.action = 'tenant.suspended' WHERE t.id = '{activeTenantId}' ORDER BY pal."createdAt" DESC LIMIT 1
db_verification.expected: status = SUSPENDED, audit log exists with action tenant.suspended

endpoints.description: Reactivate tenant (SUSPENDED → ACTIVE)

db_verification.query: SELECT status FROM tenants WHERE id = '{suspendedTenantId}'

endpoints.description: Archive tenant (SUSPENDED → ARCHIVED). Irreversible from UI (BR-PLT-003).

db_verification.query: SELECT status FROM tenants WHERE id = '{suspendedTenantId}'

test_cases.name: Archive tenant - ACTIVE → ARCHIVED → 422 (must suspend first)

endpoints.description: Upsert module overrides for tenant. Pushes tenant.modules_changed webhook for changed modules.

db_verification.expected: Records exist for finance (true) and crm (false)

endpoints.description: Upsert feature flags for tenant

db_verification.expected: Records exist for ai_forecasting (true) and beta_dashboard (false)

test_cases.name: Upsert feature flags - empty flags array → 400

endpoints.description: Change tenant's subscription plan. Pushes tenant.plan_changed webhook. Idempotent if same plan.
Get tenant billing status. Lazy-initializes TenantBilling if none exists.

test_cases.name: Get billing - tenant with no billing record → lazy-init defaults

endpoints.description: Change billing enforcement action. Follows state machine (BR-PLT-004).

db_verification.query: SELECT tb."enforcementAction", t."billingStatus" FROM "tenant_billings" tb JOIN tenants t ON t.id = tb."tenantId" WHERE tb."tenantId" = '{tenantId}'

test_cases.name: Enforcement READ_ONLY → SUSPENDED (escalation to tenant suspension)

db_verification.query: SELECT tb."enforcementAction", t.status FROM "tenant_billings" tb JOIN tenants t ON t.id = tb."tenantId" WHERE tb."tenantId" = '{readOnlyTenantId}'
SELECT tb."enforcementAction", t.status FROM "tenant_billings" tb JOIN tenants t ON t.id = tb."tenantId" WHERE tb."tenantId" = '{enforcementSuspendedTenantId}'

test_cases.name: Get AI quota - PLATFORM_VIEWER can view

test_cases.name: Update AI quota - happy path (increase token allowance)
Update AI quota - adjust soft/hard limits
Update AI quota - no quota fields besides reason → 400

endpoints.description: Get complete entitlements for a tenant (ERP internal). Cache-Control: 5 min.
Get tenant's operational status (lightweight). Cache-Control: 60s.

test_cases.name: Get tenant status - invalid service token → 401

endpoints.description: Check if a specific module is accessible for a tenant

test_cases.name: Module access - module in plan → allowed
Module access - module NOT in plan → denied

endpoints.description: Check user quota status for tenant
Pre-flight AI quota check before making an AI call

test_cases.name: AI quota check - under limit → allowed
AI quota check - soft limit warning
AI quota check - hard limit reached (aiHardLimit=true) → allowed=false
AI quota check - invalid service token → 401

endpoints.description: Record AI usage after a successful call. Idempotent on requestId.

db_verification.expected: Record exists with provider=anthropic, model=claude-sonnet-4-5, totalTokens=800

test_cases.name: Record AI usage - BYOK does NOT increment quota

db_verification.expected: isByok = true, tokensUsed on TenantAiQuota NOT incremented

test_cases.name: Record AI usage - duplicate requestId → idempotent 200

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM "tenant_ai_usages" WHERE "requestId" = 'req-unique-001'

test_cases.name: Record AI usage - missing required fields → 400
Record AI usage - invalid service token → 401

endpoints.description: Get AI usage summary for current billing period aggregated by feature and provider

test_cases.name: Get AI usage - no usage data → 200 with zeros
Get AI usage - invalid service token → 401

endpoints.description: ERP webhook listener for platform events (cache invalidation, quota warnings). On ERP API port 3000.
Platform health check including database and Redis connectivity

test_cases.name: Health check - returns correct structure with DB connectivity

business_rules_tested: BR-PLT-001: Strict tenant lifecycle state machine transitions
BR-PLT-005: READ_ONLY blocks writes (enforcementAction propagated via webhook)
BR-PLT-006: Plan change immediate effect via webhook cache invalidation
BR-PLT-017: Every state-changing action logged to PlatformAuditLog
BR-PLT-018: Mandatory MFA for PLATFORM_ADMIN accounts
BR-PLT-019: ERP must check entitlements at login
BR-PLT-020: ERP degrades gracefully if Platform unreachable (circuit breaker)
nfrs_tested: NFR50: Durable AI usage records (idempotent requestId)
